title: Vanilla Mastered
description: This modpack improves the minecraft experience without changing the vanilla feeling
body:
_**Vanilla Mastered**_ is a carefully curated modpack designed to elevate the core Minecraft experience while preserving its authentic feel. It focuses on subtle enhancements, quality-of-life improvements, and performance optimizations that make the game feel smoother, deeper, and more immersive—without straying from what makes Minecraft, Minecraft.

Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, Vanilla Mastered keeps the familiar gameplay intact while adding just enough polish to make it feel like the way the game was always meant to be played.
